title: Cymboglossum cymbiforme
intro: Cymboglossum cymbiforme, also known as Chinese or Japanese cymbidium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family (Liliaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and possessing antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The bioactive constituents of Cymboglossum cymbiforme include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and respiratory infections.
